text:
B. 2025 MCAHPS Format Tables 33

su_type: Survey Type (1-4)

SAS Format: $TYPEF

1: MA PDP

2: MA ONLY

3: PDP

4: FFS

su_web_surv: Indicates Whether Submitted Web Survey Came from Prenotiﬁcation Letter, Web Invitation, or Reminder

SAS Format: WEBF

1: Prenotiﬁcation letter URL/PIN

2: Paper web invitation URL/PIN

3: Email web invitation URL/PIN

4: Email reminder URL/PIN

8: Not Applicable
 web_at_home: RECODE : Do you ever use the internet at home

SAS Format: YNA

1: YES

2:
